display.purpose: Page heroes and empty-state headlines; light fractional weight (wght 280) is the neural-expressive signature.

body.purpose: Default reading text; 65–75ch max for prose.

label.purpose: Buttons, chips, form labels — body size, one weight step firmer (wght 470).

mono.purpose: Code, terminal panes, IDs, and the cli density mode.

shadows.name: rest
shadows.purpose: Composer and grounded cards at rest.

shadows.name: neu-extrude
shadows.purpose: Neumorphic ground material — controls that sit in the surface.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Composer focus — the one shadow allowed to carry brand color.

motion.name: spatial-fast
motion.purpose: Press feedback; snappy with slight overshoot.

motion.name: bounce-playful
motion.purpose: Menu open, success bloom — sanctioned personality moments, user-tunable.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one shared button — coral pill, springy press, pointer sheen at high expressiveness.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-primary, #ff6b5b); color: var(--color-on-primary, #3f1008); height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-variation-settings: 'wght' 470; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1), transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-primary-emphasis, #ff9a86); transform: scale(1.025); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #ff6b5b); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: var(--color-surface-high, #282a2c); color: var(--color-on-surface, #e3e3e3); height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-variation-settings: 'wght' 470; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1), transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--color-surface-highest, #333537); transform: scale(1.025); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--color-on-surface, #e3e3e3); height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-variation-settings: 'wght' 470; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--color-surface-high, #282a2c); }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Round pill hit area; idle ink-variant, hover fills tonal and brightens.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" aria-label="Settings"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M12 1v6m0 6v10M4.2 4.2l4.3 4.3m7 7 4.3 4.3M1 12h6m6 0h10M4.2 19.8l4.3-4.3m7-7 4.3-4.3"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-on-surface-var, #c4c7c5); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s, color 0.1s, transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-icon-btn:hover { background: var(--color-surface-high, #282a2c); color: var(--color-on-surface, #e3e3e3); transform: scale(1.06); } .ds-icon-btn:active { transform: scale(0.92); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Tonal container on canvas; depth by ramp step, hairline border optional.
components.html:
Goal loop
Nightly digest of agent activity across sessions.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-surface-container, #1e1f20); border: 1px solid var(--color-outline-variant, #444746); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { color: var(--color-on-surface, #e3e3e3); font-size: 0.9375rem; font-variation-settings: 'wght' 500; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-body { color: var(--color-on-surface-var, #c4c7c5); font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.33; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Tonal fill, hairline stroke; coral focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: var(--color-surface-low, #1b1b1b); color: var(--color-on-surface, #e3e3e3); border: 1px solid var(--color-outline-variant, #444746); border-radius: 12px; height: 40px; padding: 0 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; width: 240px; transition: border-color 0.1s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-on-surface-low, #9a9b9c); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, #ff6b5b); outline-offset: 2px; border-color: var(--color-primary, #ff6b5b); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Semantic status pill — tonal tint of the semantic hue, never full saturation.
components.css: .ds-chip-ok { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-ok, #0ebc5f) 14%, transparent); color: var(--color-ok, #0ebc5f); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 3px 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-variation-settings: 'wght' 470; } .ds-chip-ok::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: currentColor; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Rail row — tonal fill + coral text when active.
components.html: ChatLoopsKnowledge
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; width: 180px; background: var(--color-rail, #1f1f1f); padding: 8px; border-radius: 16px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 9999px; color: var(--color-on-surface-var, #c4c7c5); text-decoration: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-variation-settings: 'wght' 470; transition: background 0.1s, color 0.1s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: var(--color-surface-high, #282a2c); color: var(--color-on-surface, #e3e3e3); } .ds-nav-item.ds-active { background: var(--color-primary-container, #5a1d12); color: var(--color-on-primary-container, #ffe0d6); }

narrative.northStar: The Friendly Machine in the Night Studio
narrative.overview: PersonalClaw's dashboard is a capable engine with a soft shell, working in a studio after hours. The room is dark and calm — near-black canvas, tonal surface layers instead of hard borders — and the machine's warmth shows through one coral voice that glows, blooms, and sweeps through gradient accents wherever the agent is alive. Two influences blend: a neural-expressive signature (fractional variable-font weights, ambient glow, gradient energy) and Google's playful expressive element language (pill shapes, tonal surfaces, springy overshoot), both re-tinted through PersonalClaw's own coral identity. Personality is budgeted and tunable; reduced motion collapses all of it.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first tonal layering; light mode is an override, dark is home.
One warm coral accent carrying all 'agent is alive' moments; amber as its gradient partner.
DM Sans variable at fractional weights (280–500) — weight, not size, does the expressive work.
Pill controls, springy interaction, squircle sheets; radius/spacing ride user-tunable scale tokens.
Spatial springs may overshoot; opacity/color effects are critically damped.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Coral is the only accent allowed to mean 'the agent' — selection, focus, primary action, live activity. If coral appears where nothing is active, actionable, or alive, remove it.

rules.name: The Tone-Not-Line Rule
rules.body: Depth and grouping come from the surface ramp; borders are 1px hairlines or nothing. Never a colored side-stripe.

rules.name: The Weight-First Rule
rules.body: Emphasis is a variable-weight step (400 → 470 → 500), never uppercase-with-tracking and never a new font.

rules.name: The Glow-Is-Alive Rule
rules.body: Coral-tinted glow appears only when the agent is active or the user is focused into an input — never as static decoration.

dos: Do route every color, radius, spacing, and shadow through the token system; the whole app must survive a scheme retint and the density/roundness sliders.
Do use the surface ramp for hierarchy: one tonal step per nesting level, hairline dividers at #444746.
Do keep body text at #e3e3e3 and reserve #9a9b9c for metadata.
Do scale every playful moment through expressiveness/bounciness and provide a reduced-motion path.
Do express emphasis with fractional variable weight and put the coral gradient only where the agent is alive.
donts: Don't ship hacker terminal cosplay — no green-on-black palettes, scanlines, CRT effects, or ASCII chrome.
Don't hardcode hex, px radii, or spacing in components.
Don't use colored side-stripes, gradient text, nested cards, or glassmorphism outside the sanctioned glass-sky overlay material.
Don't bounce opacity or color — overshoot belongs to spatial properties only.
Don't put coral on inactive states or decorative fills; semantic colors never decorate.
Don't use uppercase tracked eyebrows or display sizes inside panels — weight steps carry hierarchy.
